overall.description: Game engine footage from The Last of Us Part II depicting two characters riding a horse through an abandoned, overgrown neoclassical campus at golden hour, transitioning to a snowy forest scene. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned university campus with overgrown neoclassical buildings

events.description: horse enters dark stone archway tunnel beneath building
exits archway into open sunlit courtyard with cracked pavement
horse turns right following path around corner of brick building

agents.ego_description: riding a horse with another character through abandoned overgrown campus, navigating around buildings and under archways

notable_agents.action: companion character sitting in front guiding the horse along the overgrown path

entered.detail: large abandoned building with tall stone columns and classical facade
tall white stone columns supporting building portico
overgrown dirt trail with scattered leaves
trees with orange and green autumn foliage
covered stone tunnel with graffiti on walls connecting building wings

segments.scene_description: Two characters ride a horse along an overgrown path beside a grand abandoned neoclassical building with tall stone columns. The golden hour sun casts long shadows across the autumn foliage as they approach and pass through a dark graffiti-covered archway, emerging into an open courtyard area with cracked pavement and distant stadium lights visible.

events.description: fade to black and abrupt transition from urban autumn to snowy winter forest environment
character dismounts and begins walking on foot through deep snow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow in a dense pine forest, weapon visible on back

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow creating dense forest canopy
deep white snow covering the forest floor with visible footprints
large snow-dusted boulder formation on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Following a transition to a winter environment, the character walks alone through a dense snowy forest. Tall pine trees heavy with snow line the path while overcast skies create diffused lighting. The character moves steadily forward through the deep snow, leaving footprints behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sun-drenched, overgrown neoclassical campus into a desolate, snow-covered wilderness. It begins with two characters riding a horse along a path beside a grand stone building, where the golden hour sun casts long shadows across autumn foliage. As they pass through a dark, graffiti-covered archway, the scene opens into a wide courtyard of cracked pavement and distant stadium lights. The environment then shifts abruptly to a winter landscape, where the camera follows a lone character walking through a dense forest of snow-heavy pine trees. Finally, the warm light gives way to a diffused, overcast sky as the character moves steadily forward, leaving a trail of footprints in the deep snow.
